programme.title: Moesha

Mary may be faced with eviction when 227's stingy landlord dies, and her nemesis Sandra is in line to inherit the building.
When Mary can't solve daughter Brenda's boy problems, Brenda enlists the aid of an expert -- Mary's nemesis, Sandra, their sultry, sexy and 'man-wise' neighbor.

Young Calvin's unemployment has gotten everyone at '227' so concerned that 'always-involved' Mary badgers husband Lester into hiring him--but when Lester is forced to fire the awkward teenager, the residents explode.

After Mary's refrigerator breaks down, her sly and opportunistic neighbor Sandra readily agrees to use her 'influence' on their stingy landlord to get her a new one--in exchange for Mary lending her apartment to Sandra for one of her 'small gatherings.'

Mary Jenkins, the irrepressible meddler and protector of '227' gives honesty a beating after she backs into a neighbor's parked car and then calls upon her 'man-wise' nemesis Sandra to use her feminine wiles to calm the handsome man's anger.
Mary fires Cupid's arrow at her brother Lewis and best friend Rose, but she misses the mark when Lewis sets his own sights on resident vamp Sandra.
Brenda's genealogy assignment triggers a war between her mother Mary and neighbor Sandra over famous ancestors--but Mary's pride soon goes AWOL when she learns her family tree has root rot.

Both Mary and Sandra get a different view of womanhood when housewife Mary attempts to rekindle lost love by 'steppin' out' with husband Lester, while party-happy Sandra is homebound with her six-year-old niece for the weekend.
Everyone's abuzz when the 'birds and the bees' invade '227,' but Brenda and Calvin may wind up getting stung when Mary discovers their secret rendezvous.

Mary's friends head for the highway after she implicates them in an angry letter to the President about a street pothole--but they make a quick U-turn when they discover the President himself is coming to fill in the hole.

programme.title: Sanford and Son

programme.title: Are We There Yet?

programme.desc: Danny has reached a limit with Sam's overbearing party habit. Hattie intervenes to stop Danny from leaving Sam by handcuffing herself to Sam after a wild party with White Lightning.

programme.desc: As payback for Sam's constant partying, Danny decides to withhold his half of the rent.

programme.desc: Sam has finally toned down on the partying, but continues to be loose with women. Danny and Drew play a crude trick on him to teach him a lesson, by making him think that he killed his latest hookup, Heather.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Love Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: After her annual checkup at the hospital and after overhearing the others about Vivian's horse, Hattie believes she might be dying.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Love Thy Neighbor

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Love Thy Neighbor

programme.desc: Suzanne's overprotective mother arrives and causes tension between her and Nick when she questions Nick's abilities as a husband.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: In the wake of the fashion show incident, the crew works on rebuilding and proving that they are stronger than ever before. When Sassy shows up, Ceaser makes it clear that anyone associated with Puma is not allowed on his turf. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: When Donna speaks her mind one too many times for Ceaser's liking, he sends her packing. A customer appreciation (aka mixxxy) field trip to a water park ends in fireworks when Sky finds out that Ted has been messing around. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: In the wake of Puma's devastating loss of Ink 124, Ceaser meets with Med, who gives him the offer of a lifetime. Now, Ceaser finds himself torn between his inevitable and dreaded move to North Carolina, and the chance to run Harlem. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ceaser finds himself looking for a house in North Carolina. Daddy Rick fires up the grill for some good old Southern hospitality, and for Ceaser, the pressure is on. Back in Harlem, Sky checks in with Puma and tells him to man up. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: After turning down a dream offer, Ceaser questions the person he is becoming. Sky talks to a friend and figures out a way to find closure with a heartbreaking piece of her past. Dutchess is shocked when Ceaser asks for a prenup. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: In the wake of the prenup ask, Dutchess and Ceaser discuss ownership of Black Ink. Quani visits with Tamia and Puma realizes that the distant is hurting his family. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Donna is finally given her shot at tattooing but struggles with her emotions over devastating news. Shit's new fling, Blue, comes in with a little stick that holds big news and has O S**t thinking about his future. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: The crew throws down for a mixxxy party, and when a shocking video is played, Kathie loses it. Puma reveals some big news to Quani and asks her to come home to New York. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: In the first ever Black Ink Crew Reunion, host Big Tigger reunites the cast for an exclusive mixxy party to relive three seasons of drama and air each others' dirty laundry.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: After leaving Black Ink closed for a month, Ceaser is back in Harlem. In North Carolina, Dutchess still has to pay for unexpected renovations before her tattoo shop can open. Kathie warns O'Sh*t about child support payments.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ceaser's arrest sends shock waves through Black Ink. Puma is opening up a brand new tattoo shop to give Black Ink a run for its money. All hell breaks loose when Ted hires a new tattoo artist behind Ceaser's back.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: A new tattoo artist is given the traditional Black Ink welcome. The girls head to Miami Beach for Sky's butt-lift surgery. What transpires after a night at the club threatens to tear Ceaser and Dutchess apart.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Sky goes under the knife to get the body she's been wanting since she was a teenager. Ceaser declares war when he finds out that Puma has opened a rival shop. Donna spills the beans about her night of passion with Dutchess.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Donna's allegations about Dutchess send shockwaves through the shop. Naeem introduces his girlfriend Alexis to the Art2Ink crew. Walt struggles with his new responsibilities as a full-time dad.

programme.desc: Focusing on the intersection of politics and global business.

programme.title: Bloomberg Businessweek Daily
programme.desc: Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec bring reporting from the magazine that helps global leaders stay ahead, plus insight on the people, companies and trends shaping today's complex economy.

programme.title: Bloomberg: The Close
programme.desc: Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld break down the day's top market-moving stories and trading action around the closing bell.

programme.title: Bloomberg: Balance of Power
programme.desc: Focusing on the intersection of politics and global business.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer
programme.desc: Scientists are developing more powerful magnets to enable clean energy sources like fusion; China's dominance of the supply chain for rare earth magnets threatens their global availability.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer
programme.desc: S2EO6 AI's rapid growth is pushing global energy demand skyward, forcing electrical grids to expand and modernize. Now, companies from China to Nigeria are investing in new tech to power the future.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Asia Trade
programme.desc: Bringing global investors everything you need to know as the trading day begins in Asia; Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders.

programme.title: Bloomberg: The China Show
programme.desc: From politics and policy to tech and trends, Yvonne Man and David Ingles give global investors insight into the world's second-biggest economy, delivering in-depth discussions with newsmakers.

programme.title: Insight With Haslinda Amin
programme.desc: The definitive guide for global news audiences to get the complete picture on the story of the day, through probing interviews and nuanced conversations.

programme.title: Bloomberg Horizons Middle East & Africa
programme.desc: A spotlight on the fast-paced growth and major deals happening across the Middle East and Africa, linking the market drivers from overnight in the U.S. and across Asia into the region's trading day, with deep-dive analysis of the top businesses.

programme.title: Bloomberg Daybreak: Europe
programme.desc: From London, essential morning viewing to stay ahead of the day's market trends with news stories from the U.S. and Asia in the lead-up to the opening of European markets.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Opening Trade
programme.desc: "The Opening Trade" explores things to know as markets open across Europe; analysis that isn't available anywhere else, a break-down of the biggest stories of the day and top guests who have skin in the game.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank causes family tension when he assigns Jamie to guard Danny after a hit is put on him, and when Frank tries to stop his cop grandson, Joe Hill (Will Hochman), from seeking revenge after he's attacked.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny and Baez's attempts to find the culprit who assaulted a shop owner are hindered by the close-knit community's refusal to cooperate with the investigation.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny partners with Anthony to solve a double homicide when Anthony's shady cousin, Joey (Anthony DeSando), proves to have gang ties to the crime.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank enlists the help of an old friend, Sloane Thompson (Alex Kingston), to investigate a cyber-attack on the NYPD that forces Danny and Baez to release an evasive suspect.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: An illegal drug shipment arriving in New York City forces Danny to partner up with his Texas Ranger associate to find the narcotics. Also, Jamie makes a concerning discovery about a former mentor, and Frank receives pushback from Mayor Chase.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny pursues Dickie Delaney (Jimmy Buffett), a con artist pretending to be the legendary singer Jimmy Buffett, after he's tricked into paying for the scammer's meal at an expensive restaurant.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank is at odds with his friend Archbishop Kearns (Stacy Keach) when he says the NYPD arrested the wrong man for a murder, but he can't break the confessional seal to reveal the true killer's identity.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny and Baez's investigation into a brutal assault on a NYPD detective reveals a dirty cop within Frank's ranks. Also, Eddie and Badillo track down bookstore culprits; Jamie joins Henry as he looks into a friend's death; and Erin snoops on a new woman.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Erin and Anthony team up with Erin's nephew, police officer Joe Hill, to course-correct a trial when Joe becomes aware of witness tampering.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank contends with public outcry to defund the NYPD School Safety Division, after a physical altercation between a school officer and a student goes viral.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank, Baker, Garrett and Gormley experience feelings of guilt when Detective Angela Reddick (Ilfenish Hadera), an officer they briefly worked with at 1PP, is shot after Frank reassigned her for not meshing with their team.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank is blindsided when Mayor Chase bypasses him with a request for Jamie to head his security detail. Also, Danny and Baez investigate the murder of a wealthy college student, and Eddie experiences tension with her partner, Badillo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: A local celebrity asks Frank to make an exception to the NYPD age limit; an encounter with an old rival leads Erin to look into an alleged wrongful conviction; Jamie is torn over whether to report a sergeant; Danny and Baez look for an abducted kid.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: When Erin is stalked by a man who was released from prison after serving 12 years, she enlists Anthony and Danny to investigate her office's role in his sentencing. Also, Jamie works to save his badge when he is caught driving under the influence.

programme.title: Bonanza

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Cartwrights protect a woman and her deaf-mute little son from the boy's outlaw stepfather.

programme.title: Bonanza

programme.desc: Warbling Andy Walker returns to Virginia City a big success, along with his shifty Uncle Thaddeus.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Cuando Gibbs acepta ayudar a la amiga de la infancia de su hija, quien murió hace 15 años, se encuentra en el centro de un viaje emotivo e introspectivo a su pasado, llevando a una impactante y dolorosa conclusión.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Cuando aparece un video de oficiales participando en un claro caso de trampa, Frank se centra en encontrar al policía que filtró el video.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Frank pregunta si un encuentro con activistas comunitarios fue un accidente o una trampa. Jamie se esfuerza por depender menos de la información de Frank para tomar decisiones.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Después de que un ex oficial espera a Frank en un restaurante, se siente culpable por las circunstancias que rodearon el despido y trata de reintegrarla.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Un médium se acerca a Danny y Baez, afirmando saber qué le pasó a una mujer que fue encontrada muerta de un aparente suicidio.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Después de un asesino en serie es ejecutado en Oklahoma, un imitador aparece y los agentes del FBI son llamados para encontrarlo. Al mismo tiempo, Prentiss se pone nerviosa pensando en una importante compra inmobiliaria.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC presenta uno de los casos más longevos de un asesino en serie a unos estudiantes universitarios, y llevan la clase a través de los 20 años en los que persiguieron al asesino.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una banda de ladrones de bancos inicia su último robo en un banco de Washington D.C., la UAC intenta negociar los rehenes con los ladrones, pero las apuestas comienzan a elevarse cuando uno de los suyos se convierte en rehén.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Mientras la UAC continua persiguiendo a los ladrones, el equipo determina que los sospechosos tienen un objetivo más grande en D.C., y con uno del equipo como rehén, tienen que trabajar rápidamente para desactivar una situación explosiva.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Cuando Gibbs acepta ayudar a la amiga de la infancia de su hija, quien murió hace 15 años, se encuentra en el centro de un viaje emotivo e introspectivo a su pasado, llevando a una impactante y dolorosa conclusión.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: El equipo del NCIS investiga la muerte de un almirante de la Marina, la cual toma un giro inesperado y emotivo cuando se encuentran con una mujer buscando a su marido desaparecido, un refugiado político africano.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: El equipo del NCIS cuida a un niño de nueve años cuyo padre es buscado por un caso de asesinato sin resolver.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: El equipo del NCIS paga un alto precio cuando intentan localizar a un marino que cree que aún se encuentra en Irak.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted suspect tries to hide from officers, a woman calls deputies to apprehend her hostile husband, and a passenger tries to outrun the police during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man loses his friend and finds trouble, officers stop a vehicle they believe was involved in a shooting, and a suspicious vehicle leads to a suspicious story.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A disastrous carjacking results in an arrest. Officers make an arrest in a domestic abuse call involving two women. Officers find drug paraphernalia on a man who’s suspiciously parked in the middle of the street.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A traffic stop becomes dangerous when the suspect takes off on the interstate. Officers find a large bag of drugs in a man’s pants. Officers respond to a dispute at a familiar location.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers encounter an unusual situation where the victim and suspect have barricaded themselves inside the house. Officers respond to a domestic dispute at a nearby apartment complex. A man explains how his ex-girlfriend climbed into his window.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect leads Officers on a car chase before running from a K9. A PIT maneuver is used to end a stolen vehicle pursuit. A man claims he has crazy eyes when a Deputy suspects him of driving high.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call that a man shot up his parents' house, a fleeing suspect hopes a change of clothes will fool the police, and a shaky hit-and-run story unravels.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A traffic stop escalates to a dangerous situation, a woman admits to hitting her dad in the face with her teeth, and a defiant driver doesn't want deputies to search his car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An injured suspect spots his window of opportunity, a man tries to order officers around who caught him with unsavory items, and detectives catch someone in a sting.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Prostitute sting operations prove successful for undercover officers in both Wichita, KS and Palm Beach, FL. Officers inform an unsuspecting John that the individual offering up services is likely not who he thinks they are.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A father-to-be kicks off a dangerous vehicle pursuit over something trivial. A car that ducked out of a DUI checkpoint attracts attention. Officers respond to a disturbance caused by a local man’s erratic behavior.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man leads officers on a frantic foot-chase, deputies assist two teens in tracking down a man who stole their bike, and a dispute between roommates takes a dark turn.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A vehicle tries to force an off-duty deputy off of the road. An officer responds to a domestic disturbance call involving a woman and her husband's potential lover. A hostile man is out-of-control at a local residence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man hands police his gun unannounced, an oblivious suspect tries to make money ripping off two detectives, and a driver's inability to do simple math lands her in hot water.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers arrest a couple during an argument over who the narcotics belong to. Police seize a large bag of marijuana after a routine stop. A man is caught harboring drugs under his tongue during questioning.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist allegedly mistakes a deputy for a thief and tries to escape into the bushes. Police cut a dad some slack by not towing the family car. Two sisters catch the police’s attention when they take their spat to the road.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A traffic stop takes a surprising turn when a suspect creates a spur-of-the-moment diversion, and a soft-spoken driver has difficulty being upfront with the officers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: It’s all deputies and dogs on deck in an attempt to subdue a man in distress. A suspect proves to be too sleepy to engage in truck thievery. A baby is rescued in a car with no air conditioning.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A resistant suspect thinks he sees monsters everywhere. Cops are forced to officiate a spousal wrestling match. Officers try to sort out where two motorists got their car and whose dope they possess.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: After leading police on a slow pursuit, a sharply-dressed driver has a heated talk with another deputy. In spite of her tears, police unravel a woman’s lies one-by-one. A traditionally bad omen turns into good luck for a couple.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police track a vehicle leaving a known drug house, officers sort out the facts of a domestic disturbance call, and a daughter trashes her parents' house and threatens police.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer pursues an unruly bicyclist, a man ducks into a drive-through in an attempt to elude police, and a deputy pulls over a stolen vehicle driven by a repeat offender.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A narcotics sting in Alabama yields arrests, officers chase a drunk driver to his front yard, and a woman who called the police for help does not make a good case for herself.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: When a driver fails to stop, a freeway pursuit ensues. Officers investigate a suspicious car parked in a commercial parking lot. Officers respond to a shoplifting call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: During a routine traffic stop, an Officer recognizes the passengers from a prior drug related arrest. A K-9 unit assists in the pursuit of a grand theft auto suspect who flees on foot.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man riding a bike at night with no lights decides to take off rather than talk with police, and a dangerous domestic dispute unfolds on the streets of Texas.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man arguing with his father over money fights with three Deputies after an unsuccessful Taser deployment. A motorcycle runs from cops in Fontana. A suspect in Alameda County rams a patrol vehicle.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The disturbing death of a 3-year-old girl has a great impact on Catherine as she searches for clues to her murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Brass and Nick get help from an unlikely source, an incarcerated criminal (Method Man), when investigating two murders that take place in the same apartment building.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team discover several victims who have green blood, leading them to the conclusion that their deaths are somehow connected.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and the CSI team become involved in the world of Hollywood comedy when a diva sitcom star (Sagal) meets an untimely demise while filming her show in Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick is accused of murdering a famous Vegas gangster, and even he is uncertain of his guilt or innocence.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Gil Grissom is the supervisor of the graveyard shift of Las Vegas' elite crime scene investigators. Holly Gribbs, fresh out of the academy, joins the team.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A man is killed after winning a fortune and then dumping his girlfriend. So, Grissom, Nick, and newcomer to the CSI team, Sara Sidle, investigate this one.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Nick, and Sara search for a kidnapped woman and find more than they expected. Catherine and Warrick investigate the hit-and-run death of a little girl.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine investigate when a leg is found severed from a body in a lake. Meanwhile, Sara and Nick investigate a fraternity pledging gone terribly wrong.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Warrick take the case of a young man who is found naked in the desert without an obvious cause of death.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine violates department protocol when she takes the case of a rape accusation against her ex-husband. Warrick and Sara search for the missing bullet that will either exonerate or indict a cop for murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a teenager and her sister are the sole survivors of the gruesome murder of four members of one family in a quiet suburban neighborhood, Grissom and his entire team investigate the crime.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Royce Harmon was murdered 3 months ago in a scene staged to look like a suicide. Now another murder has taken place. Whoever the killer is he has a thorough knowledge of forensics, he purposefully has left evidence, and has baffled Grissom and his team.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate the death of a first class passenger on a flight to Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: El encaprichamiento de un sospechoso con Catherine hace que ésta se haga cargo de un caso de alto perfil.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: El sheriff está sometido a presiones políticas para que descubra quién mató a un comisario aéreo con un coche bomba del que el sheriff fue testigo.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Un adolescente aparece asesinado en una obra en construcción. Grissom, Sara y Warrick siguen la pista de la sangre en un martillo.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: El único miembro del jurado que se resistía a votar aparece muerto en la sala del jurado. Los once jurados que votaban culpable y que odiaban al jurado muerto son los sospechosos naturales.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Una mujer aparece asesinada en su casa. Su parecido con Sara hace que Grissom se interese personalmente por el caso y le obliga a examinar las decisiones que ha tomado en su vida.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara y Nick responden a una electrocución en un casino. El casino alberga antigüedades japonesas. La electrocución no es más que una treta para robar la pieza central de la exposición.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Un robo en una tienda de comestibles acaba en un tiroteo que deja cinco muertos. El policía cree que Grissom le guarda rencor.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Todo el equipo debe investigar un crimen en el que un marido y su esposa, estrella del porno, fueron asesinados al estilo ejecución.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Catherine y Sara se enfrentan a la muerte de lo que al principio parece ser un travesti.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Un cuerpo femenino mutilado es descubierto atado a los bajos de un autobús que transporta presas de un correccional de mujeres, después de que un brazo amputado salga volando de debajo del vehículo y golpee un coche.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Un violento asesinato en el aparcamiento de un casino y otro episodio en la sala de interrogatorios de la policía llevan a los CSI a un sorprendente descubrimiento tras otro.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Warrick, Catherine y Nick intentan determinar la causa del incendio de una casa en el que muere una adolescente. El incendio se produce en el mismo barrio que otro incendio provocado similar.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Grissom, Catherine y Nick investigan la muerte de un corredor durante una competición. Mientras tanto, Sara y Warrick investigan la muerte de una pareja en una habitación de hotel, que inicialmente se pensó que había sido un asesinato-suicidio.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Una montaña rusa se sale de la vía y deja seis muertos. El equipo de CSI investiga si se trata de un accidente o de juego sucio.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When it's revealed that a ring of underground labs are manufacturing deadly drugs, Horatio and Speedle investigate the situation.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and Speedle investigate when a burglar and rapist has been sexually assaulted and taped to his bedposts after being suffocated to death.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the team are exposed to radiation while investigating a murder, which leads them to an environmental lawyer dying of radiation poisoning.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the team are called to investigate the murder of an eastern European immigrant stabbed to death in a peep show booth.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and his team race to find new evidence for a murder trial already underway in order to avoid the conviction of a possibly innocent man.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: It was supposed to be a routine undercover trip to the incinerator to dispose of drug evidence, but the police officers are ambushed.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio's case of a murdered woman is compromised when the federal agents, who have their own agenda to follow, get involved.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: An ex-con who Horatio sent to jail asks him to help find his missing son. He finds marijuana while searching the boy’s room.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Students from all over the country descend on Miami for a week of fun in the sun. The party comes to a halt when the CSIs are called in on two cases.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Speedle and Delko are enjoying a hot Miami nightspot, "Club Descent," when the DJ's pyrotechnics triggers a fire that engulfs the club.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs delve into the "tweaker" culture after a brutal murder and near-fatal explosion takes place at the home of a methamphetamine addict.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Horatio is called to the Miami West Detention Center to investigate a murdered inmate, he ends up witnessing three inmates escape.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: After a young model is killed by a hit and run driver, Horatio investigates the car's owner, who claims he loaned it out to the guests at his party.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A man harpooned to his yacht leads Horatio into the world of modern-day treasure hunting and the massive greed that goes along with it.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: El mundo de los videos extremos de patinetas se vuelve mortal cuando la competencia se acalora dentro del estudio. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: La temporada de impuestos comienza con todo cuando dos agentes de Hacienda aparecen muertos. Llaman a Horatio Caine y al equipo de CSI para investigar.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: El club nocturno más sexy de South Beach en Miami se convierte en un hervidero de venganza cuando un asesinato cierra las puertas de un servicio de citas único.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Una niña de ocho años se convierte en el peón inocente de un juego feo y abusivo que termina en asesinato. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Un reencuentro de la escuela secundaria se vuelve mortal cuando un compañero de clase se deja llevar por un resentimiento de 15 años, Horatio y Yelina descubren que Ray aún puede estar vivo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI trabaja contrarreloj para encontrar al supuesto cómplice en un caso de asesinato con hacha de hace años antes de que se ejecute al asesino convicto.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI corre contra el tiempo para localizar y desactivar una bomba radiactiva que estallará en medio del centro de Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo de CSI se enfrentan a la infame y mortal pandilla Mala Noche de Miami después de que un funeral se convierte en el escenario de un asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Un accidente de navegación familiar revela un siniestro complot de estafadores para robar diez millones de dólares en lingotes de oro. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: El equipo investiga el asesinato de una adolescente que estaba de fiesta en Miami de camino a las Bahamas con su clase de secundaria.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Un joven enfrenta cadena perpetua, y posiblemente algo peor, a menos que Horatio pueda probar su inocencia contra adversidades insuperables.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo corren contra el tiempo para descubrir quién está tratando de incriminar a Horatio por el asesinato de una mujer con la que ha estado saliendo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando un fin de semana de esposas termina en asesinato, el equipo de CSI se enfrenta a tres mujeres cuyas citas separadas con la víctima las convierten en las principales sospechosas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: El equipo trabaja en conjunto con el jefe de CSI de Nueva York, Mac Taylor, para arrestar a un asesino en serie antes de que mate a la joven que acaba de tomar como rehén.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a rich real estate agent is found dead in a brownstone, Mac and Stella work with evidence that suggests he was either a kidnapper or kidnapee.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Danny and Mac find a corpse in a salt truck which is then later identified to be a high-powered extreme sports executive.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a college student is found dead in a maze at the Queen’s county farm museum, the CSIs discover a cult-like fraternity with harsh punishments.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac investigates the death of a girl found in a bathtub filled with rose petals. Stella questions the death of a man who fell in his fish tank.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Danny investigate a case in which a delusional ex-con is found dead in his home while lying on top of a bed of cash.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team investigates a case in which magic-trick inspired murders occur including a woman being cut in half while in a wooden box.

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A knight in shining armor impaled with a lance in central park and a businessman stabbed by an ice pick in a nearby hotel share a connection.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A serial killer’s verdict overturned when Mac jails his arresting officer, but a victim surfaces sporting the killer’s signature.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Stella is forced to deal with painful memories when Det. Valens visits and says her DNA is connected to a Philadelphia cold case making her a suspect.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs are puzzled when evidence and witnesses point to John McEnroe as their murder suspect despite his air-tight alibi.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac, Stella, and Hawkes are forced to save the lab when a drug lord and his crew descend upon the CSI’s vault to retrieve their merchandise.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A murder on the Statue of Liberty rattles New York City as the CSI team tries to catch the killer before he strikes again.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the death of a professional diver in relation to a rumor of sunken treasure in the New York Harbor.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: El costo de vivir (S5 Ep5)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga la muerte de un joven arqueólogo que pudo haber descubierto la respuesta al misterio de uno de los asesinatos más antiguos de la ciudad de Nueva York.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Suficiente (S5 Ep6)
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a tiros a tres acusados en la víspera de su juicio, Mac se ve obligado a cumplir una promesa que le hizo a un testigo reacio.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español
programme.desc: Cuando dos hombres que comparten el mismo nombre que el detective Mac Taylor son asesinados. El detective Taylor acorrala a todos los demás Mac Taylor en Nueva York y trata de averiguar quién será la próxima víctima.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español
programme.desc: Los restos de una joven embarazada de 17 años son encontrados en el maletero de un coche aplastado, pero el bebé está desaparecido. Durante la investigación, Danny descubre algunas noticias impactantes sobre Lindsay

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: El triángulo (S5 Ep10)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI se ve obligado a investigar dos crímenes a la vez con un misterioso campo de energía cerca del Empire State Building en el centro de ambos.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: La fruta prohibida (S5 Ep11)
programme.desc: Parece que el equipo de CSI tiene un caso sencillo después de que un sospechoso de asesinato queda empalado durante una persecución policial, pero resulta que recién está comenzando.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)
programme.desc: Lucca y Anisio se conocieron en una 'app' gay, pero Lucca tiene dos penes desarrollados. También, Pedro está casado y, aún así, buscaba sexo en Internet con hombres porque es bisexual.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)
programme.desc: Dayani usa una aplicación para buscar relaciones sexuales, una foto la atrae. Además, Julio financió la reconstrucción vaginal de su esposa, pero su terapia incluye la penetración del doctor.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)
programme.desc: Indira tenía un noviazgo con el hijo de Gema, cuenta que el chico era agresivo, pero hay dudas de su versión. Dora tiene un gimnasio de yoga, en sus clases combina la práctica con la cerveza.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)
programme.desc: Rotsen perdió a su familia en un accidente de tránsito y el conductor se fugó. También, Joana padece vitiligo, una enfermedad que le causa más problemas sociales que médicos.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)
programme.desc: Lili es despedida de su trabajo como mesera porque ha tenido una erección en horario laboral. Además, un pastor rompe el acuerdo de mantener al hijo de Mónica porque ella fue infiel.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)
programme.desc: Claudia estaba casada con un pastor, pero él mantenía una relación homosexual con Alberto. En otro caso, Verónica publicó en Internet una falsa Alerta Amber en contra de David.

programme.desc: Solanch y Marcelo tienen un albergue de transgéneros, Marcelo ahora quiere sacarlos. También, en un viaje de vacaciones, el mar arrastró a la sobrina de Miguel y murió, él tiene un trauma.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)
programme.desc: Ana se enganchó con la droga y perdió la custodia de su hija, que ahora está con su suegra. En otro caso, Santiago exige disolver su adopción para poder casarse con su madre adoptiva.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)
programme.desc: Tras perder a su familia en un accidente, no le encuentra sentido a la vida, su socio no le quiere comprar su parte del negocio. Alejandra fue violada en su apartamento que tiene seguridad.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)
programme.desc: Contrató la publicidad para su empresa de cosméticos, no le gustó el resultado. En otro caso, Guillermo hace varios viajes por su trabajo y los aprovecha para verse con su amante.

programme.desc: Yamilka está casada con Amhir, un polí­gamo y extremista, y ahora quiere salir de ese infierno. También, Joely se acercó a una congregación religiosa buscando apoyo pero perdió a su bebé.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: While attempting to take over the Underworld, a young demon plots to lure the Charmed Ones out of hiding, but when Billie stumbles onto his plot ,she becomes one of his victims instead.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: When Piper goes for a job interview with a corporate recruiter, she's shocked to learn that the background check of her assumed identity was that of a woman wanted for murder.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Wyatt's school play brings out the competitive nature in Piper when her hand-sewn costume & parenting abilities are criticized by another mother. However things go from bad to worse, because this Stepford-like mother is actually a demon in disguise.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Billie jeopardizes the Charmed Ones' new lives when Agent Murphy spots her using her powers to save an innocent. Meanwhile, Phoebe's overnight trip with Dex comes to a surprising conclusion when Billie casts a spell to make her happy.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Billie must deal with her painful childhood memories of her sister's kidnapping, before she can vanquish her latest demon target, The Dogan. Meanwhile, the press are bombarding the sisters, since the announcement of their teaming with Homeland Security.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Wanting to return to her old career as a social worker, Paige's plans get put on hold, when her Whitelighter father, Sam, returns asking for her help with his charge.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Agent Murphy gives the sisters their first Homeland Security case - searching through cold case files, where Phoebe and Billie discover a belt that gives Billie superpowers.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: When a demon escapes from custody, Agent Murphy enlists the Charmed Ones to help, where they learn a government created virus is spreading amongst magical beings, that causes them to 'hulk out'.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: The Angel of Death returns to visit the Charmed Ones but they're shocked to learn that he's there for Leo. To try to stop him from taking Leo, Piper casts a spell that backfires, making every man a Leo lookalike.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: When her parents come for a visit, Billie accidently transforms them into assassins and also manages to contact a demon who is posing as a human. Meanwhile, Piper attempts to continue her life without Leo.

programme.desc: The Sparta Police investigate a suspicious car crash and discover connections to a fraudulent development plan to build a new mall in Sparta and to the murder of Virgil Tibbs’ old friend who had invested his life savings into the deal.

programme.desc: Julie Lofton is a blind woman who witnesses the murder of her neighbor and quickly calls the Sparta police. As the police investigate, they discover the murder was committed to cover up an industrial crime, and now Julie's life may be in danger.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A high school student is the only witness to the brutal rape of his teacher, but his overprotective father refuses to allow him to get involved. He wants to help catch the man that assaulted his teacher, but is he brave enough to disobey his father?

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Bubba Skinner goes to Los Angeles to take custody of a suspected arsonist and bring him back to Sparta, but the arsonist disappears and is later found murdered. A pretty insurance fraud investigator helps Bubba uncover the truth behind the murder.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A man offers a $1,000,000 reward for the capture - dead or alive - of the man who raped and murdered his daughter on a public tennis court, throwing the city into greed-fueled chaos.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker, Trivette, and CD take a vacation together. While there to fish, some men think they are there to find his drug operation. This places the rangers in danger as they are hunted down.

programme.title: The Fugitive

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: A retired silent film comedian, Pinky, donates his films to the Phoenix Foundation and together, he and MacGyver, find themselves caught in a deadly trap woven by a special effects master named Neil who is out for revenge.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: It's a tasty tale for the t.v. tabloids when Community General's most famous patient attractive t.v. star, Pamela, is caught on tape fleeing the murder scene of ex-husband number four.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: It's a strange twist of fate when millionaire William Bissell, checks into the hospital and stumbles upon his ex-lover, Nurse Jenny Morgan. After Bissell's found murdered by lethal injection, Jenny becomes the number one suspect.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: As a favor to a colleague, Dr. Sloan agrees to perform surgery on mafia kingpin Alfred Johnson. A supposed routine heart operation turns into an untimely death for The Don.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dying of gunshot wounds, private investigator Charlie Harper whispers one final cryptic message to Dr. Sloan. Intrigued, Sloan searches for the meaning of the dying man's last words with the aid of Charlie's secretary, Georgia.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Kill 'em with laughter. That's just what Bonnie Valin did when she murdered her husband with nitrous oxide or laughing gas.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: Bobby and Shelly reaffirm their love. Cooper calls Shelly, Donna and Audrey together to warn them about Earle. Briggs shows Cooper a tape of Windom Earle making a report on his quest for the Black Lodge.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Jan thinks she' has no talent after not being chosen for a ballet recital, so the family tries to make her feel better and help her find a skill.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Mike takes the entire family on a trip to King's Island amusement park, where he is to submit plans to a client, but the a mix-up causes the blueprints to go missing at the park.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: A series of misunderstandings lead the Bradys to believe that Alice and Sam are up to much more than just bowling on their upcoming Saturday night date.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Jan makes a bunch of promises to be elected "Most Popular Girl" in her class, but backs out of them after she wins the election. Meanwhile, Mike and Carol try to make plans for their second honeymoon.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: A bathroom fire drives the Bunkers from the house in the middle of the night. Later Archie expects a handsome insurance check.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike and Gloria have an argument after a Scrabble game about Mike always being right and that she never did get to go to college as Mike had promised. Mike also ends up with Archie as a roommate for one night.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: To change the public perception of their lodge Archie proposes that they let in a black Jewish fellow from his work.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie gets a rude shock when the tall,classy dame whose life he saved in a taxicab turns out to be a man.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: The day has come that Mike and Gloria are moving into their new home and Archie is practically pushing them out the door. Archie is being so obnoxious that Mike finally reaches a boiling point until he declares his independence and calls Archie a fathead.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie will do anything to get a promotion at the loading dock. So, he agrees to help Mr. Sanders with his latest charity, unaware that it involves something that goes against his morals - organ donation.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: While driving Munson's cab, Archie saves the life of a beautiful woman who becomes unconscious. Uh, was that a woman? Sorry, that was no woman, thanks to female impersonator Beverly LaSalle's convincing act.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike - along with everyone else - debate where he should be when Gloria is in the delivery room giving birth to their baby.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama is sworn in as Mayor and the whole family attends her inauguration, but she soon finds out that the job is not as easy as she originally thought.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama's vacuum cleaner has broken, and Vint tells her that she can use Naomi's. Mama uses it, but it blows up and ruins her rug. Mama and Naomi blame one another for this and take each other to court.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: It is Mama's birthday, and all she wants is for everyone to help her clean the attic. Buzz is the only family member to not make up an excuse, so he ends up helping her as she reminisces about her thirtieth birthday.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama's brother-in-law Roy Harper has come to visit Carl for his birthday, not knowing that his brother is dead. Against Mama's wishes, Vint asks Roy to stay for a while.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: While filling in for an advice columnist, Fran uses Mama's advice and becomes a hit. Since Mama has given Fran all her advice, Buzz insists Mama gets half of the profits, but Fran refuses.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama can't get anyone to go to the cemetery with her, so she just goes by herself. After arriving and having a long talk with Carl, she notices that the grave that is reserved for her actually has another woman there.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama's sister, Frannie, has just passed away, and she is determined to give her late sister something she never had a "perfect day." But things soon turn from perfect to terrible as one disaster after another strikes.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama discovers Fran is worth $35,000 and stipulates that a portion would be split evenly between Mama, Vint, and Naomi. One stipulation stands between Mama and the money, she has to keep from losing her temper for 2 weeks.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Ellen stops by with a gift for Mama and to attempt to once again apologize for missing her Aunt Fran's funeral. Mama refuses to forgive her and throws her out. Later, the family learns that Ellen is in the hospital.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: When Mama's dreams start providing the names of winning horses, the family figures they're in the money.

programme.desc: Bumped from their fishing lodge cabin, Al and Jefferson seek revenge against actress Shannon Tweed.

programme.title: Classica Spotlight

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: In early 1984, three-year-old Vanessa Bennett becomes the lone survivor of her family's brutal murder. Initial investigators suspect a serial killer is at large, but decades pass before DNA narrows the suspect pool to one man.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: In 1989, socialite Susan Doll was found beaten, raped, and strangled in Colorado.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Police in Albany, N.Y., get a surprise when a killer they think targets only older women is suspected in the murder of an elderly man. And the contents of a secret storage shed holds the grisly clues to a murder that has gone cold for more than 14 years.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: On a bitter morning in 1980, radio intern Helene Pruszynski is found brutalized in a snowy field. After 37 years of fruitless leads, investigators tap into a genealogy website that gives them a lead.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: In Rhode Island, policewomen go undercover as streetwalkers to nab the man suspected of murdering three prostitutes. And a dagger-shaped letter opener is the key piece of evidence that links a priest to the grisly 1980 murder of a nun in Ohio.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Testimony about the growth of larvae in dead bodies helps convict the man who stabbed a couple to death and strangled their 4-year-old daughter in 1993.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Police reopen a rape-murder case 25 years after the crime and find enough DNA evidence to bring him to justice. And a confession made to a "Baywatch" TV star helps police solve the three-year-old riddle of a wealthy Newport Beach woman's murder.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: In Missouri, a part-time missionary is convicted, 38 years later, of killing her 5-year-old stepdaughter, and the skeleton of a Michigan boy, dead for 10 years, leads police to a serial killer.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: When a deadly house fire claims the life of a family in rural Oklahoma, investigators suspect foul play and it sends a mother on a decades-long crusade to find out what happened to her missing teenage daughter and best friend.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A kidnapper grabs 8-year-old Chad Choice from his home in Texas, then torments his parents with two ransom demands. The case goes cold until the parents receive a chilling package in the mail that contains a letter--and a skull.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A look at the case of James Allen Selby, a serial rapist who eluded police for years while attacking 11 women in five states - Oklahoma, Nevada, California, Arizona, and Colorado.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: The killing of a woman in a VA goes unsolved for a quarter of a century before investigators are finally able to zero in on the likely killer. And, in 1999 detectives test the blood evidence and develop a DNA profile of a shooting death from 1980.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A woman's fall from a cliff in the Grand Canyon leads police to uncover a series of grisly murders, and investigators smoke out a killer when they find crucial DNA evidence on his cigarette butts.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: Halloween in a small town is canceled indefinitely when a young girl is kidnapped and killed on her way home from a costume party.

programme.title: Nathan For You

programme.desc: In an effort to protect their children from kidnappers, the parents hire the owner of City Wok Restaurant to build the Great Wall of South Park.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Kenny died with the winning ticket to a prize of endless candy in his pocket. The boys decide to build a ladder to Heaven where they expect to find him and get the ticket back.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: The boys embark upon a mythical quest as they set out to return their copy of the 'The Lord of the Rings' movie to their local video store.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: The boys are sentenced to the Death Camp of Tolerance where they learn how to treat minorities. Mr. Slave and Lemmiwinks make their debut in this episode.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: When a famous psychic fails to help him exorcise Kenny from his body, Cartman and Chef travel to the moors of Scotland, where Chef's mom tries a little of her voodoo magic on him.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: When a 32-year-old man claiming to be Stan from the future shows up in South Park, young Stan is forced to come to terms with the loser he will become.

programme.title: South Park

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: A victim of the Salem witch trials curses the town, one woman changes the way people celebrate Halloween, and Vlad the Impaler inspires the novel "Dracula." Featuring Seth Rogen, Allison Tolman, Jorma Taccone and Joel McHale.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Tiffany Haddish, Evan Rachel Wood, Busy Philipps and Mandy Moore pay tribute to the first woman to fight in the Revolutionary War and receive a pension, a museum curator who saved art from the Nazis and Civil War hero Clara Barton.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: A lawyer defends the lives of rats in court, Henry Bergh establishes the ASPCA, and horse learns to solve math problems. Featuring Mae Whitman, Claudia O'Doherty, Paul Scheer, Martin Starr and Samm Levine.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Taran Killam, Jerry O'Connell and Bob Odenkirk explore the lives of Jack Parsons, an occultist and rocket scientist; W.C. Minor, the man who helped write the Oxford English Dictionary; and Rasputin, adviser to Tsar Nicholas II.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Abbi Jacobson, Josh Charles, Amber Tamblyn, Jane Krakowski and Jillian Bell salute Margaret Sanger's crusade for accessible birth control, the creation of the Kinsey scale, and Gloria Steinem's undercover work at The Playboy Club.

programme.desc: En este nuevo episodio de Bar Central: Conde Fabregat, Miguel "Burra" Pérez Gil y Marcela Lecuona disfrutarán de la hora feliz de la comedia junto a Franco Escamilla.

programme.desc: Ceci Ponce, Mauricio "El Diablito" Barrientos y Tony Dalton

programme.title: Con el culo al aire
programme.desc: Chus, la hermana de Lola, llega al camping y le dice que va a quedarse para cuidarla. Lola está horrorizada: sabe que no ha venido para eso, sino para vengarse de ella por acostarse con su marido.

programme.title: Con el culo al aire
programme.desc: Tino y Javi impiden que Rubén, un joven indigente, se suicide. Padre e hijo se lo llevan al camping y una vez allí, Rubén reconoce a José Luis y a Sonsoles: ellos fueron quienes le arruinaron la vida.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Una prueba vocacional dice que las profesiones ideales de Daria y Quinn son de sepulturera y modelo. Daria es obligada a trabajar con Kevin vendiendo nueces para mejorar su desenvolvimiento social.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: La amenaza de un huracán en Lawndale causa en la gente el raro efecto de empezar a cantar y a bailar. Daria y Jane suben a la terraza del colegio para no tener que asistir al partido de fútbol americano pero finalmente es cancelado.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: La gran casa de los Lane comienza a llenarse de diversos familiares. Primero se escapa Jane a pedirle a Daria pasar unos días en su casa, luego Trent hace lo mismo y finalmente Amanda Lane.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Jake sufre un infarto y lentamente se recupera en casa, Helen tiene que lidiar con su suegra. Quinn quiere ser cardióloga para ayudar a Jake en caso de futuros ataques.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Satanás está organizando la fiesta de disfraces más grande de Halloween y nadie entra sin su pulsera azul, pero las travesuras de los más notables asesinos seriales de todos los tiempos arruinan todo.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: El Señor Garrison le explica a la clase la teoría de la evolución, aunque está totalmente en contra de esa postura. Mientras tanto, Cartman no puede esperar a que llegue el día del lanzamiento de una consola de videojuegos.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Cartman se congela a sí mismo, despertando 500 años en el futuro cuando hay nutrias agresivas y lo peor de todo: ¡No hay Nintendo Wii! ¿Podrá Cartman escapar de ese crudo futuro?

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Stan se convierte en entrenador de un equipo de hockey y trata de hacerlos ganadores. Mientras tanto, su padre tiene que lidiar con el recuerdo de una presentación de Stan en un partido de años atrás.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan es admitido a una reconocida escuela privada y Gaspar al no poder cubrir los gastos decide aventurarse con Peluzín en unos negocios turbios, mientras el Noruego busca consejos por parte de su familia porque no esta contento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El abuelo se ahoga con un hueso de pollo y LFDB se ve forzada a buscar ayuda de emergencia, mientras que el Noruego y Peluzín deciden ingresar a un gimnasio y competir por los resultados.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The DCC take the field for the first time in their signature DCC boots. Learning the DCC entrance proves very challenging for some, while others struggle to get accustomed to dancing in cowboy boots. Melissa Rycroft is featured.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The recruits do media training with NBC 5 Dallas-Fort Worth lead news anchors Meredith Land, Kelli, and Judy name two triangle points, and guest judge Melissa Rycroft sits in.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The ladies put their modeling skills to the test on photoshoot day, Julia tries to bounce back after her car accident, and the dancers get a lesson in healthy cooking.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With one week until the start of the season, Kelli and Judy make a tough cut, the show group performs for the first time, and Charlotte Jones Anderson judges rehearsal.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: To make their final cut, Kelli and her team try to find one hopeful of the remaining 37 who isn't ready to perform at the Cowboys' home opener.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: After an unusual online audition process, the rookie candidates for the 2020 squad move into an isolated training camp bubble amid the ongoing COVID-19 pandemic.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A top-ranking officer in the Canadian military pleaded guilty to a number of crimes, from home invasions and lingerie theft to murder.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: After Todd Chance is murdered, police follow a trail of video evidence as they work to track down the killer.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Police suspect a woman's estranged husband in her stabbing death, but surveillance video shows he was not at the scene.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Police investigate whether the shooting of a young woman in Utah was an accident or something more sinister.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Kidnappers target a 24-year-old American woman living in South America.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Authorities open a cold case of the disappearance of Carol Lubahn.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The mystery of a successful real estate entrepreneur killed by a car bomb spans nearly two decades.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: After a woman goes missing on Blood Mountain in the Chattahoochee National Forest, authorities suspect the man responsible was reenacting a horror movie.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: After following the case for more than fifteen years, Dateline delivers a comprehensive report with rarely-seen interrogation video, new insight from prosecutors, and surprising details from the other woman, Amber Frey, who helped uncover the truth.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When Nichole Payne and her son Taylor are found dead in their home, it takes nearly a decade to unravel what happened; for the first time on television, Nichole's children share what they saw the day their mother and brother were murdered.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a San Antonio man shoots his wife, he claims to have shot her after mistaking her for an intruder.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The investigation into the disappearance of a young mother in the Pacific Northwest leads authorities to an estranged husband, an ex-boyfriend and a suspicious neighbor.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Chaos follows when Snooki and JWoww get the ladies to spill the tea. Vinny makes a love connection with someone unexpected. An argument between the women leads to a very awkward dinner.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Pauly and Nikki invite the ladies to join a fun game of improv until things get out of hand. Vinny insults one of the ladies and ends up in the doghouse. Vinny makes a surprising move at elimination.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Excitement turns to embarrassment when the ladies' friends and family come for a visit and start revealing the ladies' secrets. Vinny gets roasted by a parent. And a dinner conversation raises red flags for Pauly and Nikki.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: The pressure is on when the ladies must make good impressions on Vinny's mom, Paola, and Uncle Nino. Paola's shocking feedback leaves Vinny confused about who to send home.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Double dates with Pauly and Nikki give Vinny a glimpse at his future with "the one" as he makes his final decision. Vinny shocks one lady by sending her home early.

programme.title: I Love New York: Do You Have Love For New York?
programme.desc: After getting her heart broken not once but twice, New York summons 20 single men to her mansion with the hope of finding true love. The guys think its one big party until New York's mom busts in through the front door.

programme.title: I Love New York: The Mangeant
programme.desc: Chamo, NY's Assistant, calls the 15 guys to the backyard for a meeting. New York addresses them from her balcony – they will be competing in a male beauty pageant, a mangeant, and the winners will get dates with her.

programme.title: I Love New York: Big Ballers
programme.desc: The remaining 12 guys start their day with the usual trash-talking until Chamo delivers a New York Note.

programme.title: I Love New York: What's Up Dog
programme.desc: Chamo delivers a New York Note to the guys: it says that NY wants a man that is good with his hands. The remaining 9 guys will break up into 3 teams of 3 and build dog houses for NY's Chihuahua, Her Majesty.

programme.title: I Love New York: Who's Got Game
programme.desc: New York is down to her lucky 7 and wants to know which guys have skills on the court. She's lookin' for a baller.

programme.title: I Love New York: Momma Said Knock You Out
programme.desc: The 6 guys gather in the living room when New York tells them that they will be hosting a party for her girls while she goes shopping. The guys' excitement turns to terror when ten screaming 11-year-old girls run in the front door.

programme.title: I Love New York: Guess Who's Coming To Dinner
programme.desc: New York decides to run background checks on the remaining 5 guys, so she invites their ex-girlfriends to spend a day at the spa. While the guys sweat it out at the mansion, their exes give NY and her mom all the dirt they want to know.

programme.title: I Love New York: Gettin' Hot In The Desert
programme.desc: New York wants to get to know the guys better, so she takes them on 2 separate overnight double dates to Palm Springs. At the end of each night, she chooses one special guy to join her in her room for a nightcap.

programme.title: I Love New York: Momma's Boys
programme.desc: All 3 guys have met New York's mom, now it's her turn to meet theirs. The guys and their moms do their best to impress NY and Sister Patterson but they are tough ladies.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jane and Holly J team up for a practicum business assignment and immediately bond over their idea to start a babysitting agency.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Riley’s having a great semester. He’s even taking lifeguard training to prepare for a summer job.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: News travels fast about Riley and Sam’s big fight. Riley doesn’t think much of it – until rumours start spreading that Sam was gay-bashed.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s Matchmaker week at Degrassi and Declan’s not interested in a serious relationship. The Diplomat brat is here for a good time, not a long time.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Against all odds, Holly J has fallen for Declan. Suddenly she gets what everyone’s been so excited about for so long.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: KC’s living the high school dream. The basketball team made it to the provincial finals, the Sports Awards Gala is coming up, and he finally has a mentor who gets him – Coach Carson.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: KC’s life is on the fast track. With the final basketball game approaching, the pressure is at an all-time high and Coach Carson has really taken KC under his wing.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma and Kelly make a pit stop at Degrassi while on their Cross Country Bike Adventure raising awareness for their Re-Cycle project. Combining the great outdoors with her sexy boyfriend, Emma’s convinced she’s destined for the best summer ever.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s been a tough year for Peter. Mia’s departure, a brief meth problem, and the serious downgrade from lead singer to roadie.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Sav and Anya have been planning for their Spring Formal for as long as they can remember. It’s going to be magical.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Anya is more determined than ever to convince Sav they should be together – even if he is bringing family-friend and arranged-marriage-bride Farrah to the Spring Formal.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Post-KC, Clare’s social life consists of building props for Declan’s musical and reading every book in the “Fortnight” vampire series. But when Clare has a sexy vampire dream about Declan, she’s shocked by her inner fantasy life.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Riley’s completed anger management and has been named ‘Degrassi’s most eligible bachelor’. He’s been keeping his true feelings about guys under wraps – but he’s not sure he wants to anymore.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Holly J and Declan are closer than ever. They’ve made it through the year, Holly J’s applied for internships all over the city, and with exams almost done, all they need to worry about is Declan’s musical.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: While driving, David tells his wife Laura that he wants a divorce. Laura becomes hysterical and begins to cry and hit him. Trying to fight off his wife's attacks, David loses control of the car and flies into an intersection.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Jim, the hospital janitor, teaches Dr. Sloan some magic tricks. Jim is a whiz at magic and can nimbly manipulate a medallion between his fingers.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: George, a schizophrenic homeless man, shows up on a beach prophesizing about death. The couple in the nearby beach apartment, Cynthia and Ethan, threaten to call the police.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: When Steve Sloan is hospitalized for injuries sustained in a high-speed car chase, he wakes in a haze and watches with a blurred vision what looks like another patient being stabbed by one of the medical staff in his room.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Nurse Stacy Bradshaw tells Dr. Sloan about her skydiving escapades, and he politely turns down her extreme thrill-seeking invitation to come along.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Travis catches Dr. Sloan in his office, settling in with a bowl of popcorn to watch a reality television show, "Hot House," a "Big Brother" and "Real World" type series.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mark's friends Stanley and Tammy have decided to preview Tammy's new fashion line at their wedding.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: At a spiritual retreat, Beth Scarburough confronts Father Dominick about his failed friendship with her husband, Matt. She pleads for him to make amends with his former friend.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Cocky medical student, Hunter Koskov, coerces his classmates, Max and Jenny, to experiment with each other by inducing "death."

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Amanda does a guest spot as a nurse on the soap opera, where she serves as a medical consultant. Star actress Thalia faints during a scene and is rushed to the emergency room.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Julia Adams comes to Dr. Sloan for a check-up. She seems a little anxious. At the same time, a man comes running through the hospital and in one highly restricted lab, knocks over and breaks a test tube.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan questions old friend and newspaper baron Barclay about the security company.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Simon Hodiak, a noted cardiologist, is a gambling addict. When his bookie strong-arms him to repay his debt of $60,000, Simon sells his Porsche.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Maureen Tate is ogling over her nephew, Casey, with sister Grace. Maureen panics when there is a knock at the door, and the man's voice declares he is the police.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: Though the ancient powers have endured for centuries, their destruction is close at hand. However, some will leave lasting legacies that will continue to shape the world long after their downfall.

programme.title: Treasures of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: Alastair Sooke tells the story of Ancient Egyptian art and how it reflected the civilisation's religion, through thirty extraordinary masterpieces.

programme.title: Treasures of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: Alastair Sooke explores the sumptuous treasures of the Golden Age of Egyptian art, starting with troubling psychological portraits of tyrant king Senwosret III, and ending with the golden mask of boy-king Tutankhamun.

programme.title: Treasures of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: From the statues of Rameses II to the final flourishes under Queen Cleopatra, Sooke discovers that the subsequent invasions by foreign rulers, from the Nubians and Alexander the Great to the Romans, produced a new hybrid art full of surprise.

programme.title: Secrets of the Pyramids

programme.title: Tutankhamun: Life, Death and Legacy
